data.content: Removed BeatTypeBadge and BeatPriorityBadge from RetakeRow header. Replaced with fully qualified knot ID (firstBeatAlias or beat.id). Removed abbreviated knot ID from byline so last_updated and tags slide left. Updated alias-view-contract test. All quality gates pass (lint 0 errors, tsc clean, 2212 tests pass, build succeeds).
